The '''1996 Castleford Tigers season''' was the [[Castleford Tigers|club]]'s 1st year in the [[Super League]]. The club finished in 9th place. Castleford also competed in the [[Challenge Cup]], but were knocked out in the Fourth Round by [[St Helens R.F.C.|St. Helens]].
